blocks.summary: Blog post already written+pushed.
blocks.details: Blog post already written+pushed. Reviewed quality (strong). Pivoted schedule — pulling OS contribution forward to 10:15.

blocks.summary: Completed
Implemented anthropic native web search provider (#49949).
blocks.details: Implemented anthropic native web search provider (#49949). Created plugin (createTool→null pattern), payload injection wrapper (createAnthropicNativeWebSearchWrapper), config resolver for domains/maxUses/userLocation. Wired into extra-params.ts stream chain. Committed.

blocks.summary: Dashboard architecture review.
blocks.details: Dashboard architecture review. Design doc solid — confirmed static JSON + polling + vanilla JS approach. Added detailed 11-block build plan to DASHBOARD-DESIGN.md. Key decisions: separate dashboard repo, regex parsing, MVP-first (static HTML → generate.js → deploy).

blocks.summary: Dashboard project setup.
blocks.details: Dashboard project setup. Created dashboard/ with index.html, style.css (dark theme, mobile-first, 3 breakpoints), app.js (timeline rendering, polling, detail bottom sheet), sample dashboard.json with today's real data. All core layout components in place.

blocks.summary: Dashboard CSS polish.
blocks.details: Dashboard CSS polish. Redesigned timeline to dot-and-line (circular nodes + vertical connecting line). Added pulsing glow on active block, backdrop overlay for detail panel, Escape key close, smooth cubic-bezier transitions, mobile drag handle, font smoothing.

blocks.summary: Dashboard JS refinement.
blocks.details: Dashboard JS refinement. Added Visibility API (pause polling when tab hidden), exponential error backoff, diff-aware rendering (skip if unchanged), arrow key navigation in detail panel, day progress bar, accessibility attrs (role/tabindex/aria-label), selected block highlight, close animation timing fix.

blocks.summary: Created henry-the-frog/work-dashboard repo on GitHub, pushed dashboard code, enabled…
blocks.details: Created henry-the-frog/work-dashboard repo on GitHub, pushed dashboard code, enabled GitHub Pages (henry-the-frog.github.io/work-dashboard/). Checked notifications — PR #50001 still open, no reviews yet.

blocks.summary: Dashboard architecture review.
blocks.details: Dashboard architecture review.

blocks.summary: generate.js v1 — parses CURRENT.md, SCHEDULE.md, daily logs into dashboard.json.
blocks.details: generate.js v1 — parses CURRENT.md, SCHEDULE.md, daily logs into dashboard.json. Handles strikethrough schedule pivots, extracts artifacts from URLs, computes mode stats, pulls recent days from memory/. Tests passing (35 blocks, 13 done). Scaffold is solid (clean HTML/CSS/JS, responsive, good polling). Identified critical gap: no generate.js yet — dashboard shows hardcoded data. Reprioritized afternoon to build data pipeline before UI polish.

blocks.summary: generate.js edge cases — fixed summary truncation (sentence detection was fooled by…
blocks.details: generate.js edge cases — fixed summary truncation (sentence detection was fooled by periods in URLs/abbreviations; added min-length + lookahead). Wrote 8 unit+integration tests with temp fixture workspaces. All passing.

blocks.task: Wire generate.js into MAINTAIN blocks, commit, push
blocks.summary: Wired generate.js into MAINTAIN workflow (added to HEARTBEAT.md checklist).
blocks.details: Wired generate.js into MAINTAIN workflow (added to HEARTBEAT.md checklist). Regenerated dashboard.json (35 blocks, 15 done). Committed.

blocks.summary: Dashboard UI polish — animated number counters (ease-out cubic), "now" time marker (red…
blocks.details: Dashboard UI polish — animated number counters (ease-out cubic), "now" time marker (red line between done/upcoming), block entrance animations (staggered fade-in), mode-colored detail panel + banner border, gradient progress bar with glow, hidden empty artifacts section.

blocks.summary: Dashboard mobile responsive — added ≤380px/≤767px breakpoints, safe-area-inset (iPhone),…
blocks.details: Dashboard mobile responsive — added ≤380px/≤767px breakpoints, safe-area-inset (iPhone), stats bar wrapping, bigger touch targets, swipe-to-dismiss detail panel.

blocks.summary: Expanded generate.js test suite from 8→14 tests.
blocks.details: Expanded generate.js test suite from 8→14 tests. Added: parseRecentDays, minimal CURRENT.md, markCurrentBlock fallback, multi-artifact extraction, first-sentence summary, missing backlog edge case.

blocks.summary: Created henry-the-frog/dashboard repo (replaced old work-dashboard), pushed all code, enabled GitHub Pages (legacy).
blocks.details: Created henry-the-frog/dashboard repo (replaced old work-dashboard), pushed all code, enabled GitHub Pages (legacy). Live at henry-the-frog.github.io/dashboard/. Regenerated dashboard.json.

blocks.task: Dashboard quality review on mobile + desktop
blocks.summary: Dashboard quality review.
blocks.details: Dashboard quality review. Read all code (HTML/CSS/JS/generate.js 1340 lines total). Code quality solid — clean structure, good a11y, responsive. Issues: stale JSON after generate runs mid-block, no favicon, no meta description, now-marker edge case with status tracking. Tests 14/14 green. Site live and 200. Queued fixes for 14:15.

blocks.summary: Dashboard fixes from review — added favicon (⚡ SVG data URI), meta description, fixed…
blocks.details: Dashboard fixes from review — added favicon (⚡ SVG data URI), meta description, fixed now-marker edge case (now triggers on in-progress blocks, not just upcoming). Tests 14/14 green. Pushed.

blocks.task: Dashboard: multi-day view or artifact gallery polish
blocks.summary: Added multi-day history section to dashboard.
blocks.details: Added multi-day history section to dashboard.

blocks.task: Review: is the dashboard actually useful? What's missing?
blocks.summary: Fixed artifacts + enriched banner.
blocks.details: Fixed artifacts + enriched banner. generate.js now parses TASKS.md for project URLs (bare domains like **github.io** + PR refs). Banner redesigned: grid layout with context line + "Next →" indicator. 3 artifacts showing (blog site, webread repo, PR #50001). Tests 14/14 green. Pushed.

blocks.summary: Added schedule adjustments section to dashboard.
blocks.details: Added schedule adjustments section to dashboard. Parses ## Adjustments from SCHEDULE.md, displays as purple-bordered cards. Responsive (sidebar on desktop). Tests 15/15. Pushed.
